Source code for py_libraries.visualize.maker

from matplotlib import markers



[docs]
class Maker:


[docs]
    @staticmethod
    def all():
        """All named markers."""
        return list(markers.MarkerStyle.markers.keys())


    


[docs]
    @staticmethod
    def all_not_none():
        """All named markers."""
        return list(set(markers.MarkerStyle.markers.keys()) - set(Maker.none()))



    #  filled vs. unfilled 



[docs]
    @staticmethod
    def filled():
        return list(markers.MarkerStyle.filled_markers)





[docs]
    @staticmethod
    def unfilled():
        return [
            m for m in Maker.all()
            if m not in Maker.filled()
        ]





[docs]
    @staticmethod
    def fillstyles():
        return list(markers.MarkerStyle.fillstyles)



    #  geometric shapes 



[docs]
    @staticmethod
    def pixel():
        return ['.', ',']





[docs]
    @staticmethod
    def circle():
        return ['o']





[docs]
    @staticmethod
    def square():
        return ['s']





[docs]
    @staticmethod
    def diamond():
        return ['D', 'd']





[docs]
    @staticmethod
    def triangle():
        return ['v', '^', '<', '>', '1', '2', '3', '4']





[docs]
    @staticmethod
    def pentagon():
        return ['p', 'P']





[docs]
    @staticmethod
    def hexagon():
        return ['h', 'H']





[docs]
    @staticmethod
    def star():
        return ['*', 'X']





[docs]
    @staticmethod
    def cross():
        return ['+', 'x']



    #  numeric / digit markers 



[docs]
    @staticmethod
    def numeric():
        return [
            m for m in Maker.all()
            if isinstance(m, int) or (isinstance(m, str) and m.isdigit())
        ]



    #  text‐style / functional 



[docs]
    @staticmethod
    def tick():
        return ['|', '_']





[docs]
    @staticmethod
    def none():
        return ['None', 'none', ' ', '']



    # directional



[docs]
    @staticmethod
    def directional():
        return Maker.tick() + Maker.caret()


    


[docs]
    @staticmethod
    def caret():
        return [4, 5, 6, 7]  # CARETRIGHT, CARETLEFT, CARETUP, CARETDOWN



    #  everything else 



[docs]
    @staticmethod
    def other():
        known = (
            Maker.pixel()   + Maker.circle()    +
            Maker.square()  + Maker.diamond()   +
            Maker.triangle()+ Maker.pentagon()  +
            Maker.hexagon() + Maker.star()      +
            Maker.cross()   + Maker.numeric()   +
            Maker.tick()    + Maker.caret()     +
            Maker.none()
        )
        return [m for m in Maker.all() if m not in known]



    #  sanity check 



[docs]
    @staticmethod
    def verify():
        recognized = (
            Maker.pixel()   + Maker.circle() +
            Maker.square()  + Maker.diamond() +
            Maker.triangle()+ Maker.pentagon() +
            Maker.hexagon() + Maker.star()    +
            Maker.cross()   + Maker.numeric() +
            Maker.tick()    +
            Maker.none()
        )
        return [m for m in recognized if m not in Maker.all()]
